for_c_level: This complete failure elevates risk posture, confirming the system is not production-ready and undermining any customer claims on reliable AI memory sharing. No progress or validation occurred, marking a regression in testing reliability versus prior runs. Immediate CI fixes are needed to resume validation cadence.
for_non_technical: The test to check if AI agents can reliably share memories didn't run at all. There were no results because the system couldn't collect any data from the planned tests. We need to fix the testing process to get useful information next time.
for_sme: The campaign aborted without executing any of the 35 requested scenarios (e.g., S1, S1b, S2, up to S42), resulting in no reports and overall_pass false. All primitives and coverage axes were impacted due to zero coverage. Probable root cause is a harness bug in report recovery (harness_sha: 19581e1971b6fecc0408bde2ff1a85f0b44ee23f), possibly related to infra provisioning or timing issues in the DigitalOcean nyc3 4-node setup.
headline: Campaign failed with no scenario reports recovered.
next_run_change: Debug and patch the CI harness to ensure scenario reports are collected and artifacted properly.
verdict: FAIL — no scenarios executed or reported.
what_it_proved: The run demonstrated a critical failure in the CI harness or infrastructure, preventing any scenario execution or report recovery.
what_it_tested: No scenarios were exercised despite requesting 35 tests covering agent memory sharing over TLS in a 4-node federation mesh across various transports and primitives.
